title: ERA - Beta
body:
# Experience the Best Emotions from Minecraft!
This modpack adds everything we've been missing from vanilla Minecraft!

Specifically:

- Voice Chat
Talk to other players directly in-game!

- Emotes
Express yourself with a variety of emotes!

- ERA x Essentials
Note: This is not a collaboration! The mod is simply included in the pack. Add friends, play together in the same world, see which servers your friends are on, chat with them, and more!

- Dynamic Lighting
Hold a torch in your off-hand and it will light up your surroundings!

...and much more!

[![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6256e0a2eef55e458685190000d840889d3e53f0_0.webp)](https://gucksim.github.io/lume/)

### Minecraft will never be the same again.
